cketWeight} · `:''}{available} available · {packet.reservedQuantity||0} reserved · {packet.countType||'estimated'} count</small><small>{packet.daysToMaturity?`${packet.daysToMaturity} days to maturity${packet.maturityBasis?` from ${String(packet.maturityBasis).replace(/^from\s+/i,'')}`:''}`:'Maturity not entered'}</small>{packet.frontPhoto&&packet.backPhoto&&<small>Front and back photos saved</small>}</span><button onClick={()=>deletePacket(packet.id)} aria-label={`Remove ${packet.name} packet`}><X/>Remove</button></article>}):<div className="empty-memory"><Camera/><span><strong>No packet photos yet.</strong><small>Add the first packet above.</small></span></div>}</section></section></main>;
 }
diff -ruN '--exclude=node_modules' '--exclude=dist' '--exclude=package-lock.json' '--exclude=.github/workflows/phase46x3-export.yml' phase46x3base/src/seedPacketVisionClient.js phase46x3current/src/seedPacketVisionClient.js
--- phase46x3base/src/seedPacketVisionClient.js	1970-01-01 00:00:00.000000000 +0000
+++ phase46x3current/src/seedPacketVisionClient.js	2026-07-18 20:46:43.704772431 +0000
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+const DEVICE_KEY='runyan-seed-vision-device-v1';
+const deviceId=()=>{let id=localStorage.getItem(DEVICE_KEY);if(!id){id=crypto.randomUUID();localStorage.setItem(DEVICE_KEY,id)}return id};
+export async function hashPacketPhotos(front,back){const bytes=new TextEncoder().encode(`${front.slice(0,200)}:${front.length}:${back.slice(0,200)}:${back.length}`),hash=await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256',bytes);return[...new Uint8Array(hash)].map(v=>v.toString(16).padStart(2,'0')).join('')}
+export async function getSeedVisionHealth(){const response=await fetch('/api/health',{headers:{Accept:'application/json'}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('health unavailable');return response.json()}
+export async function analyzePacketPhotos({frontImage,backImage,draftContext,signal}){const photoFingerprint=await hashPacketPhotos(frontImage,backImage),response=await fetch('/api/seed-packets/analyze',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','X-Device-Id':deviceId()},body:JSON.stringify({frontImage,backImage,draftContext,photoFingerprint}),signal});const body=await response.json().catch(()=>({}));if(!response.ok){const error=new Error(body.message||'Packet analysis could not finish.');error.code=body.code;error.requestId=body.requestId;throw error}return body}
diff -ruN '--exclude=node_modules' '--exclude=dist' '--exclude=package-lock.json' '--exclude=.github/workflows/phase46x3-export.yml' phase46x3base/src/seedVisionMerge.js phase46x3current/src/seedVisionMerge.js
--- phase46x3base/src/seedVisionMerge.js	1970-01-01 00:00:00.000000000 +0000
+++ phase46x3current/src/seedVisionMerge.js	2026-07-18 20:46:43.714433198 +0000
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+const now=()=>new Date().toISOString();
+const mapping={brand:['packetIdentity','brand'],name:['packetIdentity','crop'],variety:['packetIdentity','variety'],productName:['packetIdentity','productName'],category:['packetIdentity','category'],designations:['packetIdentity','designations'],notableClaims:['packetIdentity','notableClaims'],colorDescription:['packetIdentity','colorDescription'],packetYear:['inventory','packetYear'],packedForYear:['inventory','packedForYear'],sellByDate:['inventory','sellByDate'],printedSeedCount:['inventory','printedSeedCount'],inventoryBasis:['inventory','inventoryBasis'],estimatedSeedCount:['inventory','estimatedSeedCount'],packetWeight:['inventory','packetWeightValue'],barcode:['machineIdentifiers','barcode'],lotNumber:['machineIdentifiers','lotNumber'],sunlight:['growing','sunlight'],daysToMaturity:['growing','daysToHarvest'],maturityBasis:['growing','maturityBasis'],germinationEstimate:['growing','emergenceMinimumDays'],depth:['growing','plantingDepthValue'],thinningSpacing:['growing','thinningSpacingValue'],spacing:['growing','finalSpacingValue'],rowSpacing:['growing','rowSpacingValue'],containerSuitability:['growing','containerFriendly'],sowingMethod:['instructions','sowingMethod'],directSowGuidance:['instructions','directSowGuidance'],seedStartingGuidance:['instructions','indoorStartGuidance'],transplantGuidance:['instructions','transplantGuidance'],seasonalWindow:['instructions','seasonalWindow'],frostTiming:['instructions','frostTiming'],waterGuidance:['instructions','moistureGuidance'],soilGuidance:['instructions','soilGuidance'],fertilizingGuidance:['instructions','fertilizingGuidance'],successionGuidance:['instructions','successionGuidance'],harvestGuidance:['instructions','harvestGuidance'],regionalGuidance:['instructions','regionalGuidance'],specialCare:['instructions','specialCare']};
+const get=(o,p)=>p.reduce((v,k)=>v?.[k],o);
+const fmt=(key,value,a)=>{if(value===null||value===undefined)return'';if(key==='packetWeight')return`${value} ${a.inventory.packetWeightUnit||''}`.trim();if(key==='germinationEstimate'&&a.growing.emergenceMaximumDays)return`${value}–${a.growing.emergenceMaximumDays} days`;if(['depth','thinningSpacing','spacing','rowSpacing'].includes(key))return`${value} ${get(a,['growing',key==='depth'?'plantingDepthUnit':key==='thinningSpacing'?'thinningSpacingUnit':key==='spacing'?'finalSpacingUnit':'rowSpacingUnit'])||'inch'}${Number(value)===1?'':'es'}`;if(key==='containerSuitability')return value?'Container friendly':'';if(key==='notableClaims')return Array.isArray(value)?value.join(' · '):value;return value};
+export function mergeVisionPacketResult(draft,result){const analysis=result.analysis,next={...draft,fieldMeta:{...(draft.fieldMeta||{})}},preserved=[],applied=[];for(const[key,path]of Object.entries(mapping)){const raw=get(analysis,path),value=fmt(key,raw,analysis);if(value===''||value===null||value===undefined)continue;const meta=next.fieldMeta[key];if(meta?.source==='manual'||meta?.manuallyCorrected){preserved.push(key);continue}next[key]=value;next.fieldMeta[key]={source:'packet-vision',sourceLabel:'Read from packet photos',confidence:analysis.fieldEvidence[path.at(-1)]?.confidence||'High',sourcePhoto:analysis.fieldEvidence[path.at(-1)]?.sourceImage||'both',evidence:analysis.fieldEvidence[path.at(-1)]||null,analyzedAt:result.analyzedAt,manuallyCorrected:false};applied.push(key)}next.quantity=analysis.inventory.printedSeedCount??analysis.inventory.estimatedSeedCount??next.quantity;next.countType=analysis.inventory.inventoryBasis==='exact-count'?'exact':analysis.inventory.inventoryBasis==='approximate-count'||analysis.inventory.estimatedSeedCount?'estimated':'weight-only';next.reservedQuantity=0;next.packetIntelligence={...(next.packetIntelligence||{}),vision:{version:analysis.analysisVersion,model:result.model,analyzedAt:result.analyzedAt,requestId:result.requestId,imageHashes:result.imageHashes,analysisPassCount:result.analysisPassCount,packetIdentityConfidence:analysis.quality.packetIdentityConfidence,overallAnalysisConfidence:analysis.quality.overallConfidence,fieldEvidence:analysis.fieldEvidence,unreadableFields:analysis.quality.unreadableFields,contradictoryFields:analysis.quality.contradictoryFields,exactIdentitySupportedByImages:analysis.quality.exactIdentitySupportedByImages,barcodeStatus:analysis.machineIdentifiers.checkDigitValid?'verified':analysis.machineIdentifiers.barcode?'unverified':'not-found',barcodeMethod:analysis.machineIdentifiers.barcodeMethod,analysisSourceSummary:'Front and back packet photos analyzed together.',rawVisibleText:analysis.rawVisibleText},automation:analysis.automation,conflicts:analysis.quality.contradictoryFields.map(field=>({field,status:'needs-review',detectedAt:now()}))};next.draftStatus='Ready to save';return{draft:next,applied,preserved,optionalMissing:analysis.quality.unreadableFields,conflicts:analysis.quality.contradictoryFields}}

+.packet-vision-actions{display:grid;gap:.65rem;padding:.9rem;border:1px solid var(--line,#d8d1c2);border-radius:1rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.72)}
+.packet-vision-actions .primary-button{min-height:48px;width:100%}.packet-vision-actions p{margin:0;font-size:.9rem}.packet-photo-state.state-analyzing-packet{font-weight:800}
+@media(max-width:430px){.packet-vision-actions{padding:.75rem}.packet-review-summary{margin-top:.75rem}.packet-photo-actions{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.packet-photo-actions>*{min-height:44px}}

@@ -1,11 +1,13 @@
-export const APP_VERSION='0.20.2';
-export const BUILD_ID='phase-4-6x-2-one-tap-trust';
+export const APP_VERSION='0.20.3';
+export const BUILD_ID='phase-4-6x-3-multimodal-vision';
 export const UPDATED_AT='July 18, 2026';
 export const WHATS_NEW=[
- 'Approving an exact seed packet now applies the trusted official details to the whole packet record in one step',
- 'Malformed and low-confidence scanner values are replaced automatically instead of becoming fake conflicts',
- 'Only genuine disagreements between clear packet text and approved official data require review',
- 'The front-photo status now updates when the exact packet is identified through the overall workflow',
- 'Optional packet details no longer block saving, and the full manual form remains collapsed unless needed',
- 'Seed packet entry is shorter and more trustworthy while recognition remains best-effort'
+ 'Seed packets are now analyzed using the front and back photo
